modify: The language has been changed successfully.
providelanguage: You must provide a valid language (`fr`,`en`)
help:
**The best bot to make your server happy with giveaways** :tada:

`g.help`   :   To see all bot commands.
`g.lang`   :   To change bot language fr, en.
`g.clearmessages`   :   To clear a the message count of a user or of all users.
`g.setbypassrole`   :   Select a role who can participe to the giveaways without follow the requirements.
`g.blacklist`   :   To blacklist someone from you giveaways
`g.log`   :   To change the conditions log channel

`g.invite`   :   To get bot invite link.
`g.review`   :   Send us your feedback about the bot !
`g.myinfo`   :   To see your number of messages and how many times you voted for the bot.
`g.top`   :   Send you the top writters of the server

`g.gstart`   :   To start a giveaway.
`g.greroll`   :   To find new winner(s).
`g.gend`   :   To stop the giveaway.
`g.gedit`   :   To edit the giveaway.
`g.gdelete`   :   To delete the giveaway.

[Click to join the support server](https://discord.gg/QAYDD4ayeM)・[Click to add the bot](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=746404171783340164&permissions=-1&scope=bot)

**You want a quality bot for cheap? **
> Send a private message to <@661525561394462730> *(`661525561394462730`)* asking for the desired bot and offering a price.
title: Gways BOT : The best bot to manage your giveaways.
invite:
:link: [Add the bot via this link](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=746404171783340164&permissions=-1&scope=bot)
:link: [Join the support server with this link](https://discord.gg/QAYDD4ayeM)
info:
> You sent **`msg` messages**
> You voted **`votes` times**
needargs: You need to enter the giveaway ID.
timeouterror: You took too long...Please start over.
editoptionsgiveaway:
**GIVEAWAYS MODIFICATIONS**

👤 : Change the number of winners.
✏️ : Change gift giveaway.
⏰ : Change giveaway time.

__**OPTIONS CONDITIONS**__
🔗 : Modify the server require.
📝 : Modify the number of message require.
🔊 : Modify the time pass require in voice channel.
📑 : Modify the role require.
youneedperm: You need to have **ADMINISTRATOR** permission to use this command.
youneedperm2: You need to have **MANAGE_CHANNELS** permission to use this command.
bypass: This role can now participate in giveaways without having to respect the conditions.
giveawaymax: You can't have more than 5 giveaways in your server
step1: Please provide the channel where you want the giveaway appear.
step2: Please provide the time for the giveaway.
step3: Please provide a number of winners (10 maximum).
step3error: Please provide a valid number of winners.
options:
**OPTIONS CONDITIONS** (OPTIONAL)

🔗 : Requires the person to have joined a server to participate.
📑 : Require the person to have a role to participate.
🔊 : Require the person to be in voice channel to participate.
📝 : Require the person to have written messages to participate.

**🎁 : To start the giveaway.**
**❌ : To cancel the giveaway.**
optionsmessage: Please provide a number of messages that the user must have to participate.
optionsmessageerror: Please provide a valid number of messages.
optionsvoc: Please provide the voice time that the user will need to participate
optionsrole: Please provide the role that the user must have in order to participate (**id or exact name of the role**)
optionsserver: Please provide the invitation from the server where the participant must be to participate
optionsservererror: Please provide a valid link or verify that I am on the server.
optionsganants: Please provide the new number of winners.
invalide:
I didn't find the giveaway.

> **Example :** `g.g<command> <id of the giveaway message>`
giveawaydelete: The giveaway has been successfully deleted.
giveawayend: The giveaway has been successfully stopped.
giveawayedit: The giveaway has been successfully modified.

react.reactionaccepte: Your entry to the giveaway has been accepted !
react.reactionrefuse: **Your entry to the giveaway has been refused...  Make sure you respect all the conditions**
react.blacklist: You can't enter into this giveaway beacause you are on the blacklist.
react.voice: You need to be in a voice channel

limitnan: The limit your entered needs to be a number.
limitlimited: You can't enter a limit needs to be between 5 and 50.

argsmissing.first: You need to enter some arguments: `add`, `remove` or `list`.
argsmissing.second: You need to enter the ID of the users you want to add/remove.

blacklist.nobody: Nobody is blacklisted on this server.
blacklist.list: Here is the list of all the blacklisted users on this server : {blusers}

clearmessages.args: You need to enter a user ID or `all` for all counters.
clearmessages.alldone: The message counter of the all the users on this server has been set to `0`.

log.args: You need to enter the ID or the mention of the wanted channel.
log.done: The giveaways entries log channel id now {channel} *(`{id}`)*.
log.blacklist: **(CONDITION)** `{tag}` is on the blacklist. His participation has been removed.

inviteCMD: Here are the differents invitation links for the bot. You can go on **[top.gg](https://top.gg/bot/746404171783340164)**, or just **[invite the bot directly](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=746404171783340164&permissions=-1&scope=bot)**.
enabledm: Please leave your private messages open so I can send you the form.

review.dm:
**__Hey! __**

Thank you for making this command. Thanks to this you can give us your opinion about the bot! To do this, nothing is simpler: click on the reactions below and give us your opinion.
> <:onestar:808740517256757298> - Very bad
> <:twostar:808740534030041088> - May be better
> <:threestar:808740546143191041> - Not bad, not good
> <:fourstar:808740556683083796> - A good bot
> <:fivestar:808740566606544956> - Very good
review.onestar: You have chosen to give us **a star**. Please give us the reason, but also ideas for improvement.
review.twostar: You have chosen to give us **two stars**. Please give us the reason, but also ideas for improvement.
review.threestar: You have chosen to give us **three stars**. Please give us the reason, but also ideas for improvement.
review.fourstar: You have chosen to give us **four stars**. Please give us the reason, but also ideas for improvement.
review.fivestar: You have chosen to give us **five stars**. Please give us the reason, but also ideas for improvement.
review.thanks: Thanks for your feedback, it helps us a lot!
review.new:
`{user}` just send a feedback !

**Message:** `{reason}`

Make `g.review` to post your feedback !
